description: You are a DevOps engineer maintaining a disk space reclamation tool called 'smart_dedup' located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/smart_dedup. The tool scans directories for duplicate files and replaces copies with hardlinks to save space. Users have reported critical issues including data loss from incorrect duplicate detection, crashes with 'FileExistsError' during linking, and missed deduplication for small configuration files. Fix the bugs in 'smart_dedup.py' to ensure files are compared safely using hashing, hardlinks are created correctly, and all relevant files are processed. All tests in 'tests/test_dedup.py' must pass without modification to the test files.
